raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX my daughter and I checked out of XXXX XXXX XXXX in Florida. My card was being held on file until checkout. Upon checkout my daughter left her credit card to pay for the 5 day stay in full. This was a XXXX conference that she had booked and paid for. They at that time said my card had NO charges on it. Citicard put a XXXX charge on my card, which was the balance that my daughter paid in full. 
I filed a dispute with Citicard. I sent an itemized fully paid bill that shows clearly nothing owed to XXXX I mailed copies of the paid bills to the address Citibank gave me. I filled out and mailed requested forms. They have still not removed this charge. I have been a customer of Citicard for many years have an XXXX credit score, but nothing seems to make a difference. They could contact billing at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, and be told point blank there is nothing owed! I would appreciate anything that could be done at this juncture. 
XXXX XXXX
